name: Deploy Next.js via SSH on: push: branches: [ main ] # Oder 'master' jobs: build-and-deploy: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout Code uses: actions/checkout@v3 - name: Install and Build run: | npm install npm run build # Wichtig: 'output: export' muss in deiner next.config.mjs stehen! - name: 🚀 Upload to Cyberrocket uses: wlixcc/SFTP-Deploy-Action@v1.2.4 with: username: ${{ secrets.SFTP_USER }} server: ${{ secrets.SFTP_HOST }} port: ${{ secrets.SFTP_PORT }} ssh_private_key: ${{ secrets.SSH_KEY }} local_path: './out/*' # Next.js Export-Ordner remote_path: '/home/users/crossmedia/www/cross-media.tech/' delete_remote_files: true
